## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] New code has unit tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in README (if applicable)
